Abyssal Blade is an item purchasable at the Main Shop under Weapons. However, it can only be completed with items from the Secret Shop.

Abyssal Blade
The lost blade of the Commander of the Abyss, this edge cuts into an enemy's soul.
Weapons
Cost 6250 (1275)
Sell Value 3125
Active Overwhelm
Passive ? Bash
Bonus ? +26 Strength
+30% Slow Resistance
+35 Attack Damage
+16% Health Restore Amp
Shareable 0
Disassemble 0
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe

Additional Information

[edit]
  • The item's attributes grant the following additional stats:
    • 572 health and 2.6 health regeneration.
    • 26 main attack damage to heroes.
    • 11.7 main attack damage to universal heroes.
  • For Sange-based items:
    • Multiple sources of slow resistance do not stack.
    • Multiple sources of health restoration amplification do not stack.

Abilities

[edit]

Overwhelm

[edit]
Overwhelm
▶️
Ability
Unit
Affects
Enemies
Instantly stuns the target enemy unit. Pierces debuff immunity.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range:  150
Duration: 1.6
Triggers Bash's cooldown on cast.
Downtime: 2.3
35
75
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Show All
  • The caster is ordered to attack the target on cast.
  • The effect is applied instantly, despite the visual effects.
  • Can be cast on Couriers.
modifier_bashed
Bash: Stunned by bash.

Bash

[edit]
Bash
▶️
Ability
Passive
Affects
Enemies
Damage
Attack / Physical
Grants the wielder's attacks a chance to stun the target and deal bonus physical damage.
Proc Chance: 25%
Damage: 120
Stun Duration: 1.2
Ranged wielders have a lower proc chance.
Proc Chance: 10%
Multiple instances of Skull Basher-based Bash do not stack.
Does not stack with Bash of the Deep, Greater Bash, Time Lock and Sai Mode. If any of these are present, this ability is inactive.

This ability is always inactive on Clones.
Goes on cooldown when Overwhelm is cast.
Downtime: 2.3
2.3
0
  • Details
  • Status Effects
  • Misc.
  • Show All
  • Bash is a conditional attack damage bonus and has the following properties:
    • The bonus attack damage is directly added to the wielder's attack damage, but is not visible in the HUD.
    • interacts with the following mechanics:
      • Lifesteal.
      • Damage Block sources.
      • Damage Barrier sources.
    • Does not interact with the following mechanics:
      • Percentage-based bonus attack damage.
      • Critical strike.
      • Cleave.
  • Does not work against wards or buildings, but works against allied units.
  • The proc chance is determined during the unit's attack point, and uses pseudo-random distribution ( +8.47% and P(12) = 100%).
  • Bash uses a custom cooldown system. It is neither displayed on the item icon when procced, nor is affected by cooldown manipulation.
modifier_bashed
Bash: Stunned by bash.
  • ABILITY DRAFT
    Fully stacks with Time Lock, Bash of the Deep and Greater Bash.
  • The proccing attack first applies the debuff, then the damage.
  • Adds an average of 30 and 12 damage to every attack for melee and ranged heroes respectively.

Recent Changes

[edit]
Main Article: Abyssal Blade/Changelogs
Version
Description
7.41b
(2026-04-07)
  • Reduced Health Restoration bonus from 20% to 16%.
7.41
(2026-03-24)
  • Increased Slow Resistance bonus from 25% to 30%.
  • Now also modifies incoming healing (as a result of Health Restoration changes).
7.39
(2025-05-21)
  • Health Regen Amplification, Lifesteal Amplification, and Spell Lifesteal Amplification are now replaced by Health Restoration Manipulation, combining all three into one mechanic.
    • As such, Abyssal Blade now also amplifies Spell Lifesteal.
    • Reduced amplification value from 25% to 20%.
